honesty_note: Detections are unverified classical-CV candidates. attacker/victim/weapon are NOT read by the detector — every label starts null. Fill labels by hand (valid_kill true/false + identities), and add any MISSED kills as rows with detector='manual_added' so recall is measurable, before making any accuracy claim.

label_schema.valid_kill: true=real kill, false=false positive (required for detection eval)
label_schema.attacker/victim: gamertag as shown (feeds DeathEvent / content reader)
label_schema.weapon: weapon name or icon class (feeds WeaponEvent)
label_schema.headshot: bool if a headshot marker is shown
label_schema.is_trade: bool if this kill traded a recent teammate death (feeds TradeEvent)
